prestazioni: Engine: JLH-4G20TD (1.5L turbocharged inline-4) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 28 psi boost capability, paired with a Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate for precise boost control at 1.5 bar (21.7 psi) peak pressure.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors (1050cc/min) with a Radium Engineering dual-pump surge tank (2x Walbro 450 LPH pumps) and AEM 340lph high-flow fuel pump, controlled via Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with flex-fuel ethanol sensor for E85 compatibility and 350+ hp on pump gas (420+ hp on E85).

Drivetrain & Suspension: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.5-way) with Geely-specific adapter kit, paired with KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers (24-level rebound, 16-level compression, adjustable top mounts) and Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) for flat cornering at 1.2+ lateral G. Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (355mm discs) and 4-piston rear calipers (330mm discs) with Ferodo DS2500 pads for fade-resistant braking.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody conversion kit (Geely Emgrand GT Sport-specific fitment) with custom carbon fiber fender flares (3.5-inch front, 4-inch rear extensions) and integrated LED turn signals, paired with a Rocket Bunny GT-style front bumper lip and rear diffuser (carbon fiber, 3D-scanned for OEM+ fitment).

Seibon Carbon fiber hood (heat-extracting vents, 50% weight reduction) and trunk lid (dual air extractors), finished in 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents. OEM+ LED taillight retrofit with sequential turn signals (VLEDS 520-SMD bulbs) and smoked lenses.

Interior: Recaro SP-G TS II front seats (Geely-specific mounting brackets) with Schroth 6-point harnesses, NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub (Momo Mod.77 350mm suede wheel), and custom aluminum shift knob (weighted, 400g) for the 6-speed manual transmission. Full Alcantara headliner and door cards with red contrast stitching, paired with a digital dash overlay (AEM CD-7 7-inch display) replacing the stock cluster.
